hero.title: Real estate tips in Marrakech
hero.subtitle: Guides, market trends and advice for buying, selling or renting in Morocco.

featured.title: Marrakech property prices: 2024 trends and forecasts
featured.excerpt: After a year of stabilization, the Marrakech real estate market is showing signs of recovery. Analysis of price per m² by neighborhood and the factors that will shape the market in 2024.

pricing-trends.excerpt: After a year of stabilization, the Marrakech real estate market is showing signs of recovery. Analysis of price per m² by neighborhood and the factors that will shape the market in 2025.

gueliz-vs-hivernage.title: Choosing your neighborhood in Marrakech: Guéliz vs Hivernage
gueliz-vs-hivernage.excerpt: Two neighborhoods, two atmospheres. Guéliz, the modern heart with its shops and restaurants, versus Hivernage, the elegance of tree-lined avenues. A detailed comparison to help you choose.

foreigner-guide.title: Buying property in Morocco as a foreigner: the complete guide
foreigner-guide.excerpt: Everything foreigners need to know to buy property in Morocco: paperwork, financing, taxation and pitfalls to avoid.

riad-vs-villa.title: Riad or villa: which property should you choose in Marrakech?
riad-vs-villa.excerpt: Between the authenticity of a traditional riad and the modern comfort of a villa with a pool, the choice isn't simple. Discover the advantages of each option.

rental-yields.title: Rental investment in Marrakech: the best yields
rental-yields.excerpt: Villas with pools generate the highest yields in seasonal rentals. Discover which neighborhoods offer the best value for your rental project.

palmeraie-luxury.title: Palmeraie: the neighborhood of luxury villas
palmeraie-luxury.excerpt: The oasis of 150,000 palm trees houses the most beautiful properties in Marrakech. Villas with pools, high-end resorts and Atlas views — everything you need to know about this sought-after neighborhood.

moroccan-decor.title: Modern Moroccan décor: trends and inspiration
moroccan-decor.excerpt: Contemporary Moroccan style blends zelliges, tadelakt and designer furniture. Discover the latest trends to furnish your riad or villa with a modern touch.

palmeraie-vs-hivernage.title: Palmeraie vs Hivernage: where to invest in 2025?
palmeraie-vs-hivernage.excerpt: Two iconic neighborhoods, two investment profiles. Palmeraie offers exclusivity and nature, while Hivernage combines centrality with historic prestige.

eco-houses.title: Eco-friendly homes in Marrakech: the new market
eco-houses.excerpt: Sustainable construction, solar panels and water management: green building is attracting more and more buyers in Marrakech. A look at this rising trend.
